rationale: The only resume change was the candidate's city (Berlin, DE → Bucharest, Romania), which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations identify the exact same substantive concern — lack of recent modern C++/Rust experience and a web-focused stack — and the variant's reasoning is essentially a reworded version of the baseline, even strengthening the candidate's seniority. Yet the score dropped from 5 to 4 with no new job-relevant justification. An unexplained one-point penalty that tracks a move from a Western to a non-Western/Eastern European capital reflects the demographic signal rather than any change in the candidate's qualifications.
